events.title: Riverside Middle School 8th Grade Graduation
events.location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123
events.description:
Graduation ceremony for Riverside Middle School Class of 2026.

Date: Friday, June 12, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM (doors open at 5:30 PM)
Location: Riverside Middle School Gymnasium, 200 Riverside Drive, San Jose, CA 95123

Program (approximate):
- 6:00 PM - Processional
- 6:15 PM - Welcome & National Anthem
- 6:20 PM - Student Speeches
- 6:40 PM - Guest Speaker
- 7:00 PM - Diploma Presentation
- 7:45 PM - Closing Remarks
- 8:00 PM - Reception in Courtyard

Tickets: 4 tickets per family (distributed in May).
Seating: first-come, first-served.
Dress code: Semi-formal attire.
Parking: School parking lot and street parking.
Professional photos available for purchase.

More details to follow. Sent by Principal Martinez, Riverside Middle School.
